title: Goblin Traders Food Config
description: Simple mod adding goblins' favorite food type configuration
body:
# Goblin Traders Food Config

Simple mod adding goblins' favorite food type configuration. Made it in 15 mins for a friend's modpack. Currently fabric 21.1 only, [let me know](https://discord.gg/uSKXRFcbbJ) if you need this for other versions and platforms

Of course requires [Goblin Traders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders)
